description.value:
Activate A Interact

This cunning supernatural venom was originally engineered by Red Mantis alchemists. Fool's leprosy is a slow-acting but ultimately fatal ingested toxin that, once it takes hold in its victim's system, closely mimics the effects of a fast-moving form of leprosy. An attempt to divine its nature via detect poison fails unless the caster succeeds at a Secret @Check[type:religion|dc:35] or @Check[type:nature|dc:35], and Medicine checks to diagnose the effects always misidentifies the venom as a disease on any result except a critical success. @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.spells-srd.SUKaxVZW2TlM8lu0]{Neutralize Poison} and @Compendium[pf2e.actionspf2e.Treat Poison]{Treat Poison} function normally on a person suffering from fool's leprosy, but spells like remove disease do not, as the condition is a poison effect, not a disease effect; however, usage of these spells and abilities do not educate the user of the true nature of the poison.

Saving Throw @Check[type:fortitude|dc:37]

Onset 1 day

Stage 1 [[/r {4d6}[bludgeoning]]]{4d6 bludgeoning damage} (1 day)

Stage 2 [[/r {6d6}[bludgeoning]]]{6d6 bludgeoning damage}, and whenever you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Yl48xTdMh3aeQYL2]{Wounded} condition, increase the condition value by 1 (1 day)

Stage 3 [[/r {8d6}[bludgeoning]]]{8d6 bludgeoning damage} and can't heal any Hit Point damage (1 day)
